caption: An office setting features a man with sunglasses, a white shirt, and a black tie sitting behind a blue desk. He looks towards the right side of the room. On the desk sit a monitor, some papers, and a small object. In the background, a picture hangs on the wall, and an open cardboard box sits on the floor. A red FOX logo and the hashtag "#IWILLDROPYOUFOLKSOFF" are visible in the lower right corner. As the scene progresses, the camera cuts to a view of a man in a yellow shirt and a yellow cap standing in a doorway. The door has black text written on it that reads "2010 tall" and "vinsque!". The final shot is a close-up profile of the man with sunglasses, who is looking toward the person in the doorway.
